allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\wlabs\\book_memory"; try { [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable\('NOTION_API_KEY', \(Get-Content .env.local | Select-String 'NOTION_API_KEY' | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace 'NOTION_API_KEY=', '' }\)\) } catch {}; npx tsx -e "try { process.loadEnvFile\('.env.local'\) } catch {}; const { Client } = await import\('@notionhq/client'\); const notion = new Client\({ auth: process.env.NOTION_API_KEY }\); try { const res = await notion.databases.query\({ database_id: process.env.NOTION_DATABASE_ID, page_size: 1 }\); const page = res.results[0]; if \(page && page.object === 'page'\) { console.log\('Notion 연결 성공'\); for \(const [key, val] of Object.entries\(page.properties\)\) { console.log\(key + ' -> ' + val.type\) } } } catch\(e\) { console.error\('오류:', e.message\) }" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Write-Host "ROOT STRUCTURE:" ; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\wlabs\\book_memory -Depth 0 | Where-Object { $_.Name -notlike '.git' -and $_.Name -notlike 'node_modules' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name | Sort-Object ; Write-Host "`nAPP FOLDER:" ; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\wlabs\\book_memory\\app -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name | Sort-Object ; Write-Host "`nLIB FOLDER:" ; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\wlabs\\book_memory\\lib -Recurse -Depth 2 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name | Sort-Object)
